text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 05 中国力量

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 中国力量：本土AI发展优势凸显

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 应用场景优势

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 庞大市场：14亿人口，多元化需求场景

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 丰富场景：移动支付、电商、社交全球领先

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 快速迭代：场景驱动技术快速验证和优化

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: → 场景即优势，应用即创新

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 数据资源优势

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 海量数据：互联网用户规模全球第一

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 数据多样性：多语言、多文化、多场景

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 数据闭环：从应用到数据的快速反馈

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: → 数据是AI发展的核心燃料

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 工程化优势

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 快速落地：从研发到应用的超短周期

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 成本控制：极致性价比的工程优化

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 规模运营：超大规模系统的稳定运行

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: → 把AI从实验室搬到生产线

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 政策支持优势

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 国家战略：AI列为国家优先发展战略

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • "人工智能+"：深入推进产业融合

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 地方配套：各地AI产业扶持政策密集出台

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: → 政策红利持续释放

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
